2.name: Prof. Candice
2.text: I can't say that I'm surprised at all, Colin... [font size=16]and Perry... too[/font]?

3.name: Perry
3.text: W-we're sorry we're late, ma'am. W-we got attacked...

5.name: Prof. Candice
5.text: Well, no matter, come take your seats now.

6.name: Prof. Candice
6.text: I'm giving everyone an assessment before we proceed to the next topic.
